# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json', 'package.json') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: npm

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json', 'package.json') != '' }}
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Build Node app
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json', 'package.json') != '' }}
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
          cache: pip

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock') != '' }}
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pip install .; fi

      - name: Build Python package
        if: ${{ hashFiles('setup.py', 'pyproject.toml') != '' }}
        run: python -m build || true

      - name: Setup Go
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: '1.22'
          cache: true

      - name: Build Go app
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        run: go build ./...

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: |
            dist
            build
            bin
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: ./artifact

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
          SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
          rsync -az --delete ./artifact/ "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${DEPLOY_PATH}/"
